mapper.sql: select a.id, a.ip, a.name, c.lname as chute_name, d.dept_name as tname_label, c.company, a.status, a.create_user, a.create_dept, a.create_time, a.update_user, a.update_time, a.is_deleted, a.img, a.state, a.handle_time, a.handle from a_alert a left join a_camera c on c.id = a.name left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = c.tname
mapper.insert: insert into a_alert(id, ip, name, status, create_user, create_dept, create_time, is_deleted, img, state, handle_time, handle) values(#{id}, #{ip}, #{name}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{createDept}, sysdate(), #{isDeleted}, #{img}, #{state}, #{handleTime}, #{handle})
mapper.update:
update a_alert
ip = #{ip}, name = #{name}, status = #{status}, img = #{img}, state = #{state}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, handle = #{handle}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'
update a_alert set is_deleted = '1', update_time = sysdate() where id in #{id}
